name: wasp-hls
description: WebAssembly HLS Player Proof Of Concept

Build.build: Generate all Wasp-hls builds (in development mode), excluding docs and demo
Build.build -- --release: Generate all Wasp-hls builds (in release mode)
Build.build -- wasm --release: Rebuild only the Rust/wasm file, in release mode
Build.demo: Build the demo and its runtime dependencies in debug mode.
Build.demo -- --release: Build the demo and its runtime dependencies in release mode.

Checks.check: Run the standard TypeScript checks for the repo.
Checks.check -- main: Typecheck and lint the main-thread TypeScript code.
Checks.check -- worker: Typecheck and lint the worker and transmux TypeScript code.
Checks.check -- demo: Typecheck and lint the demo app.
Checks.check -- rust: Run clippy on the Rust code.

Development.start: Serve build/ and watch-rebuild the demo during development.
Development.serve: Serve the existing build directory over HTTP.
Development.scripts: Open the interactive npm script picker.

Maintenance.certificate: Generate a certificate to be able to use HTTPS locally for the demo pages (`npm run start` will then listen to HTTPS requests through a communicated port)
Maintenance.install:binaryen: Install a local Binaryen toolchain under ./tmp/binaryen.

author: peaberberian
